extensionDescription.message: Detect hand signs and control media playback

settingMirrorTitle.message: Flip camera image horizontally (for selfie cameras)

settingSkeletonTitle.message: Hide camera image and show only hand skeleton

settingWakeTitle.message: Hand sign to start media control. After detection, perform command signs within the timeout period

settingToggleLabel.description: Setting label for operation toggle gesture

settingToggleTitle.message: Toggle media control ON/OFF with a two-hand sign

settingPreferredHandTitle.message: When both hands are detected, prioritize signs from the selected hand

settingHoldTimeLabel.description: Setting label for gesture hold time

settingHoldTimeTitle.message: How long a sign must be held to confirm. Shorter = faster response, longer = fewer mistakes

settingRepeatIntervalTitle.message: Repeat interval for continuous actions like volume and seek

settingInferenceFpsTitle.message: Hand sign inference frequency. Lower values reduce CPU usage but slow down response

settingNotifyVolumeTitle.message: Volume for wake and toggle sounds. Set to 0 to mute

settingUiScaleTitle.message: Adjust the overall display size of the side panel

settingPipFontScaleLabel.description: Setting label for PiP font scale

settingPipFontScaleTitle.message: Adjust the text size of hand signs and target name in PiP / popup window
settingPipFontScaleTitle.description: Tooltip for PiP font scale setting

📷 Camera permission required

hintWakeWithTimeout.message: 🖐️ $1 to wake → sign to control ($2s, or returns to idle after 1 action)

logXrealDetected.message: 🕶️ AR glasses camera detected — auto selected

logWakeTimeout.description: Log when wake active period expires

logMediaControlOff.description: Log when media control is disabled

logWakeGestureNone.description: Log when wake is set to always active

logPreferredHandAuto.description: Log when preferred hand is set to auto

logMappingReset.description: Log when sign mapping is reset

logPipExit.description: Log when PiP mode is deactivated

pipTabLost.description: Status message when the target tab is closed

logOtherWindowStarted.message: ⚠ Stopped: recognition started in another window

pipActiveTitle.description: Heading shown when PiP is active

pipActiveHint.message: You can minimize this window. Close PiP to return to preview.

setupDescription.message: NyandSign needs camera access to detect hand signs. Press the button below and select "Allow every time" to enable camera access.

setupSuccess.message: ✅ Camera permission granted! This tab will close automatically...
setupSuccess.description: Success message after camera permission is granted

setupErrorDenied.message: Camera permission was denied. Please click the camera icon in the address bar, or go to chrome://settings/content/camera to allow access for this extension.
setupErrorDenied.description: Error message when camera permission is denied

setupErrorGeneric.description: Generic camera error on setup page

labelTargetTab.description: Label for the target tab row in the gesture section

targetTabActive.description: Shown when no specific tab is locked (follows active tab)

btnLockTab.description: Button to pin/lock the current active tab as the gesture target

btnUnlockTab.description: Button to unpin and revert to active tab tracking

logTargetTabLocked.description: Log when a tab is pinned as gesture target

logTargetTabClosed.message: Target tab was closed — reverted to active tab
logTargetTabClosed.description: Log when the pinned target tab is closed

tutorialStep1Body.message: NyandSign detects hand signs via your camera and controls media playback in the browser. Let's walk through the basics in 6 steps.

tutorialStep2Body.message: Choose a camera from the top and press "▶ Start Camera". Smart glasses cameras are auto-detected. This step advances automatically once the camera starts.

tutorialStep3Body.message: Show an Open Hand 🖐️ to activate media control. When this area turns green, perform a command sign within 5 seconds. This step advances automatically on wake.

tutorialStep4Body.message:
Default mapping:
✌️ Play/Pause  ✊ Pause  🤙 Play
👌 Mute
👍 Vol+  👎 Vol−
👉 +10s  👈 −10s

To try it out: "Open Hand 🖐️ → command sign" (wake returns to idle after 5s). You can remap signs in the "Hand Signs" section below.

tutorialStep5Body.message:
The "Media Control" toggle in the header, when OFF, keeps recognition running but stops sending actions to the media (to prevent accidental triggers).
You can also switch it ON/OFF with the two-hand sign "$1".
In Settings, "Mirror", "Skeleton only", and "Wake" type are the most useful controls.

tutorialStep5BodyNoToggle.message:
The "Media Control" toggle in the header, when OFF, keeps recognition running but stops sending actions to the media (to prevent accidental triggers).
Two-hand sign toggling is currently off — you can enable it under Settings > "Toggle".
In Settings, "Mirror", "Skeleton only", and "Wake" type are the most useful controls.
tutorialStep5BodyNoToggle.description: Tutorial step 5 body when toggle gesture is disabled

tutorialStep6Body.message: Use the side panel when you want access to settings and logs. If it gets in the way of fullscreen playback, press "📌 PiP" to switch to a small popup window that keeps hand sign control going.

tutorialBtnFinish.description: Tutorial: finish button on last step
